welcome.readyQuestion: — are you ready for the experience?

product.shippingText: Standard delivery: 2-4 business days. Free shipping on orders over {{threshold}}. Returns and exchanges are free within 14 days.

cart.emptySubtitle: You haven't added any items to your cart yet.
cart.title: Shopping Cart

kadin-blazer.name: Oversized Blazer Jacket
kadin-blazer.description: Oversized blazer jacket. 65% polyester, 35% viscose. Lined interior. Single-button closure. Front pockets. Professional dry cleaning recommended.

kadin-etek.name: Satin Midi Skirt
kadin-etek.description: Satin midi skirt. 100% polyester satin. Elastic waist detail. Elegant texture and flowing silhouette. Gentle wash at 30°C recommended.

kadin-gomlek.name: Linen Shirt
kadin-gomlek.description: Linen shirt. 100% natural linen. Relaxed fit. Button-up front. Roll-up sleeve detail. Wash at 30°C, iron on low heat.

kadin-pantolon.name: Pleated Trousers
kadin-pantolon.description: Pleated wide-leg trousers. 70% polyester, 28% viscose, 2% elastane. High waist with front pleats. Dry cleaning recommended.

kadin-triko.name: Cashmere Sweater
kadin-triko.description: Cashmere sweater. 95% cashmere, 5% elastane. Soft touch, fine knit. Crew neck. Dry cleaning recommended.

kadin-bot.name: Leather Heeled Boot
kadin-bot.description: Leather heeled boot. 100% genuine leather. Pointed toe, 7cm block heel. Leather interior lining. Zip closure. Clean with leather care spray.

kadin-trench.name: Long Trench Coat
kadin-trench.description: Long trench coat. 100% cotton gabardine. Belted waist. Double-breasted button closure. Water-resistant. Dry cleaning recommended.

kadin-bluz.name: Silk Blouse
kadin-bluz.description: Silk blouse. 100% natural silk. V-neck, long sleeve. Elegant texture, slightly sheer. Hand wash or dry clean.

kadin-kemer.name: Leather Belt
kadin-kemer.description: Leather belt. 100% genuine leather. Slim fit, gold-tone minimal buckle. Hand-stitched detail. Maintain with leather care cream.

erkek-takim.name: Slim Fit Suit
erkek-takim.description: Slim fit suit. 55% wool, 45% polyester. Single-button jacket, slim-leg trousers. Lined jacket. Professional dry cleaning recommended.

erkek-gomlek.name: Oxford Shirt
erkek-gomlek.description: Oxford shirt. 100% cotton Oxford weave. Button-down collar. Regular fit. Wash at 40°C, iron at medium heat.

erkek-chino.name: Chino Pants
erkek-chino.description: Chino pants. 98% cotton, 2% elastane. Slim fit. Side pockets and back welt pockets. Wash at 30°C.

erkek-deri-ceket.name: Leather Jacket
erkek-deri-ceket.description: Leather jacket. 100% genuine lambskin. Biker cut, minimal hardware. Matte black finish. Professional leather care recommended.

erkek-kazak.name: Merino Wool Sweater
erkek-kazak.description: Merino wool sweater. 100% extra-fine merino wool. Crew neck, fine knit. Hand wash, dry flat.

erkek-sort.name: Linen Bermuda Shorts
erkek-sort.description: Linen bermuda shorts. 100% natural linen. Relaxed fit, above-knee length. Elastic waist with drawstring. Wash at 30°C.

erkek-bomber.name: Bomber Jacket
erkek-bomber.description: Bomber jacket. 100% nylon shell, polyester lining. Ribbed collar, cuffs and hem. Zip front closure. Gentle wash at 30°C.

erkek-loafer.name: Suede Loafer
erkek-loafer.description: Suede loafer. 100% genuine suede leather. Penny loafer style, leather sole. Maintain with suede brush.

erkek-kemer.name: Leather Belt
erkek-kemer.description: Leather belt. 100% genuine full-grain leather. Classic pin buckle, silver-tone. Handcrafted. Maintain with leather care cream.

highlight.title: Virtual Try-On is Here
highlight.description: Let your customers see how products look on them before buying. Tap to try it yourself!
